creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
I am sorry that this issue has not been addressed; unfortunately I am not aware of any ongoing development effort on gvinum.

I have proposed deprecating gvinum: https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2021-March/093358.html

If you are still using gvinum and alternatives are not viable for some reason I would appreciate it if you can follow up to that mailing list posting.
